title: Had
tagline: जो था, जो हो चुका था — Had से बताओ!
summary: Had = Have/Has का past form है। इसके दो main uses हैं: 1) Past Possession — 'उसके पास बहुत पैसे थे' = 'He had a lot of money.' 2) Past Perfect — 'जब मैं पहुँचा, वह जा चुका था' = 'When I arrived, he had already left.' Had एक बहुत powerful word है जो complex past situations describe करने में help करता है।
hindiSummary: Had को समझने के लिए think करो: 'पहले था, अब नहीं है' या 'पहले हो गया था।' 'मेरे पास एक car थी (अब नहीं है)' = 'I had a car.' 'वह खाना खा चुका था (मेरे पहुँचने से पहले)' = 'He had eaten.' यह past की दो situations describe करता है।
whatYouWillLearn: Had for past possession: 'I had a bicycle.' / 'She had long hair.'
Had for Past Perfect tense: 'I had finished before he arrived.'
Sequence of events: First event + Past Perfect, Second event + Simple Past
Negative: 'I didn't have time.' / 'I hadn't finished.'
Questions: 'Did you have a car?' / 'Had you eaten?'
Conditional sentences: 'If I had known, I would have helped.'
Had better (advice): 'You had better study hard.'
Common phrases: had breakfast, had a meeting, had a problem
whyImportant: Had stories और narratives में use होता है। Interview में 'I had worked at TCS for 3 years before joining Infosys' — यही grammar है। Past Perfect के बिना complex past situations describe करना impossible है।
realLifeUsage: Interview: 'Before joining here, I had worked at Google for 2 years.'
Story: 'By the time I reached the station, the train had already left.'
Office: 'I had sent the report before the deadline.'
Regret: 'If I had prepared better, I would have cleared the exam.'
Description: 'In my childhood, we had a small house in the village.'
News: 'The company had already closed before we applied.'
Advice: 'You had better call the doctor immediately.'
Meeting: 'We had already discussed this in the last meeting.'
Travel: 'By the time we reached, the hotel had already given our room to someone else.'
Family: 'My grandfather had 10 siblings. He had a very different life.'

dailyGoal.morning: Learn past possession and Past Perfect concept — 30 min
dailyGoal.evening: Tell a story about your childhood using had — 20 min
dailyGoal.night: Write 10 sentences using Past Perfect (had + V3) — 15 min

motivationalQuote: If you had started yesterday, you would have been one day ahead. Start today and don't look back!

practiceTarget.speakingTarget: Narrate a past experience using 'had' at least 5 times
practiceTarget.writingTarget: Write a short story about your past using had for possession and Past Perfect
